text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow is finally the day of the Satsuki Sho.
However, the weather forecast is looking bleak.
choice_data_list: Looks like a storm might be on the way...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It does seem that way. But don't worry! I have a
strategy to deal with poor track conditions!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond responds with reassuring
composure. Still, to be on the safe side, we
decide to leave the academy early tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's not much rain the following morning, but
the strong winds are relentless and show no signs
of letting up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strong winds are likely to cause the trains to
stop running. With that in mind, we decide to
take a taxi to Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the weather has also backed up traffic
considerably. I was planning to be at the
racecourse by now, but we still haven't gotten off
the highway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we make it off the highway, the regular
roads are also backed up. At this rate, we're not
going to make it in time!
choice_data_list:
You've got to get out and run the rest of the
way!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll see you there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ngh! The wind is so strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets knocked back by the gusts. Spring
storms are rare this time of year. For one to delay
us in traffic like this, it's almost as if...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(An unusual storm and heavy traffic... Why does
everything have to go wrong today of all days?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Could this be... the jinx?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(At this rate, I might not make it in time for the
race at all. And even if I do, I won't be able to run
well with these frazzled nerves!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Could the jinx be trying to stop me from
achieving greatness?!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(...!
I'm not going to let that happen!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond lets out a fierce cry and tears off
down the exclusive Umamusume lane.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at Nakayama Racecourse with only thirty
minutes to go before the Satsuki Sho is scheduled
to start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head for the paddock, praying she made it on
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look around for her, and...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! I made it just in the nick of time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The weather has thrown me for a little bit of a
loop, but I think that actually helped me stay
calm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond grins in an incredible display of
mental fortitude.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the first race of the Classic Triple Crown... I
absolutely can't afford to lose here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if summoned by her determination, the sun
makes a dazzling entrance, banishing the storm
clouds.
